title: gladiolus griseus
intro: Gladiolus griseus, also known as the Sword Lily, is a type of cormous perennial plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus griseus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Gladiolus griseus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
